Epic cinematic key art for a space-opera streaming series, premium theatrical poster finish.
Scene: a colossal ring station eclipsing a red dwarf sun, a small courier ship crossing the band of light, drifting debris catching star glow in the foreground.
Camera: low-angle wide establishing composition, ship anchored on the right third, strong depth layering from foreground debris to the distant station spine.
Lighting: crimson rim light from the dwarf sun, cool starlight fill, soft volumetric haze around the station superstructure.
Color grading: deep space navy #0B1026 base, ember red #C0392B core glow, pale gold #E8C97A accent trim, restrained filmic contrast.
Texture/Medium: clean digital matte-painting finish, gentle film grain, theatrical print texture.
AR 16:9
